name_en: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance
description: Iran's Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance regulates media, publishing, cinema, music, and cultural affairs. The ministry controls press licenses, book censorship, and film permits. Under [Hossein Saffar Harandi](/people/hossein-saffar-harandi) (2005–2009), the ministry imposed severe press restrictions, shutting down numerous publications and banning Iranian journalists from working for foreign outlets. Under [Mohammad Hosseini](/people/mohammad-hosseini) (2009–2013), the ministry continued tightened cultural restrictions during Mahmoud Ahmadinejad's second term.
editorial_notes: Controls press licenses, book permits, film censorship, and cultural regulation.
